intro: Over 23 articles published between April 12 and April 29, 2026, covered law-enforcement actions and related cybersecurity incidents, with 18 classified as high severity. Threat actors Scattered Spider, Black Axe, and BlackCat (ALPHV) were observed targeting sectors including government, telecommunications, financial services, cryptocurrency, and gaming. Affected regions spanned the United States, Canada, North America, Europe, and Germany, with four medium and one informational report rounding out the coverage.
